_comment: Verax Tier-0 local pre-push gate for victauri (Rust workspace). Runs the FAST core of .github/workflows/ci.yml (Check&Lint + Test) locally at $0, no GitHub dependency: workspace clippy -D warnings, fmt --check, workspace tests. The heavier CI legs (no-default-features / release clippy, the cross-OS live-app E2E matrix) belong to a merge-time Tier-1 gate. Heavy cargo jobs are cost=8 (each saturates the 8 physical cores) so the scheduler serializes them. Run via the .githooks/pre-push hook (install: tools/install-gate.sh) or `verax pipeline --spec .verax/gate.json`.
